blended.narrative: Vail is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 29".
